tooltips.audioOnlyRegistered: Audio only available for registered users.

personaSearch.placeholder: Search by name, specialty, or describe your symptoms (e.g., headache, anxiety)
personaSearch.searchSuggestions: Try searching for: headache, anxiety, pain, sleep, diabetes, etc.

configurator.title: Start New Health Consultation
configurator.subtitle: Select from your AI Health Team
configurator.emptyTeam: Your AI Health Team is empty
configurator.noOtherSpecialists: No other specialists in your team. You can chat with AI Health Expert Carol or

carolNote.title: Note on AI Health Expert Carol's Participation:
carolNote.ruleA: A. AI Health Expert Carol is included if 0 or 2+ other specialists are selected from your team.
carolNote.ruleB: B. AI Health Expert Carol is not included if only 1 other specialist is selected from your team.

conversations.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this conversation?

team.addTeamMembersInstruction: Add team members by clicking on a card on the right.
team.maxTeamSizeNote: Maximum of five AI advisers can be added to your team. You may change your team at any time, but not during a consultation.
team.manageTeamTitle: Manage My AI Health Team (Max {{max}} Specialists)
team.removeSpecialistToUseTeamBuilder: Please remove at least one specialist to use AI Health Expert Carol's team building recommendations
team.aileenCarolRecommendTeam: Have AI Health Expert Carol recommend your health team
team.teamFullRemoveToUseBuilder: Your team is full. Please remove at least one specialist to use AI team building.
team.teamEmptyAddBelow: Your specialist team is empty. Add specialists below.
team.teamFullRemoveMember: Your team is full (Max {{max}} specialists). Please remove a member if you would like to add a different specialist.
team.addMembersClickCard: Add team members by clicking on a card in the main area
team.noMatchingSpecialists: No matching specialists found for the AI recommendations. You can try again or manually build your team.
team.medicalDisclaimerText: This platform provides health advice and guidance but cannot replace professional healthcare. Always consult qualified healthcare professionals for emergencies or serious health concerns.
team.clickToAddInstruction: Click on a card to add to your team ({{current}}/{{max}} selected). Selected specialists show a "Selected" badge.
team.teamFullInstruction: Your team is full. Remove a member to add a different specialist.
team.allSpecialistsAdded: All available specialists have been added to your team.
team.addMembersInstruction: Add team members by clicking on a card on the right.

dialogs.exitMessage: Are you sure you want to exit this consultation?
dialogs.logoutMessage: You are currently in a consultation. Logging out will end it. What would you like to do?
dialogs.deleteMessage: This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
dialogs.summarizeFirst: Would you like to get a summary before exiting?
dialogs.doneAlreadyMessage: We're here anytime you need us. Until then, be healthy, be happy!
dialogs.doneAlreadySignature: All of us (human and AI) at VirtualMD.app
dialogs.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete the conversation titled "{{title}}"?
dialogs.multiDeleteConfirmation: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected consultation(s)? This action cannot be undone.
dialogs.noAdvisersToAdd: All of your selected AI Health Advisers are already in this chat, or your list is empty (excluding current participants).

longRecording.title: Long Recording Paused
longRecording.message: We can't record more than 30 seconds without sending it. What would you like to do?

dialogs.generatingSummary: Please wait while we generate your consultation summary...
dialogs.finishConsultationMessage: This will end the active chat session. Are you sure?
dialogs.moreInfoMessage: This conversation is too short to generate a meaningful summary or differential opinion. Please continue the discussion until you have at least 150 words of conversation content.
dialogs.deleteSuccessMessage: Your conversation has been successfully deleted.
dialogs.logoutTitle: We're sorry to see you go
dialogs.aiHealthSpecialist: Your primary health and wellness AI specialist
dialogs.summaryUnavailable: Summary is being generated or is not available.

shortConv.title: Conversation Ended
shortConv.messageLine1: The conversation has ended. It is too short to save, but come again soon.
shortConv.messageLine2: Until then, be healthy, be happy.

errors.failedToSaveProfile: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to VirtualMD.app
welcome.subtitle: Start your personalized health consultation
welcome.description: Choose from our team of AI-powered health advisors to get personalized wellness insights and guidance.
welcome.greeting: Hello, {{username}}. So good to see you! Your VirtualMD team is ready 24/7 to help...
welcome.aileenCarolIntro: Hello, I'm AI Health Expert Aileen Carol. How can I help you today?
welcome.persona_welcome_message: Hello, I'm here to help with your health and wellness needs. How can I assist you today?

carolGreeting.helpBuild: Hi {{name}}! I'll help you build your perfect health team.

sidebarHeader.aileenCarolTeamBuilder: Health Expert Carol helps build your team.

sidebarFooter.disclaimerText: VirtualMD.app strives for accuracy. However, this and any AI-based service can give incorrect information. Always consult a qualified human healthcare professional.

account.title: Account Settings
account.description: From here you can permanently delete your VirtualMD.app account. This action removes your profile and all consultations.
account.confirmDeleteText: This action is irreversible. All your profile information, consultations, and files will be permanently removed. Are you sure you want to continue?

child.title: My child is sick
child.subtitle: Expert pediatric care when you need it most
child.initialMessage: I’m AI Aileen Carol, your Virtual Health Advisor. I know how worrying a sick child can be. Tell me what's going on.  Note: I'm an AI, not human; my advice may be wrong—confirm with a qualified human healthcare professional.

sleep.title: I can't sleep!
sleep.subtitle: Restore your nights, transform your days
sleep.initialMessage: I’m AI Aileen Carol, your Virtual Health Advisor, with sleep specialist AIs Benjamin Stein (Psychiatry) and AI Alice Chen (Neurology). Share your sleep challenges so we can help. Note: We're AIs, not human; our advice may be wrong—confirm with a qualified (human) healthcare professional.

nutrition.title: Nutrition for vitality
nutrition.subtitle: Enhance your energy, wellness, and sexual health through food
nutrition.initialMessage: I'm AI Aileen Carol, your Virtual Health Advisor, here with your team - AI Angelica Fordham (nutrition), Sex Therapy AI Rachel Levy, and AI African Herbalist Amina Okufur. How are you feeling today? Note: We're AI, not human; advice may be wrong—confirm with a qualified healthcare professional.

uploadFeatures.title: Document & Image Upload Features
uploadFeatures.description: Our platform offers powerful document and image analysis capabilities where you can:
uploadFeatures.benefit1: Upload health documents, lab reports, and images
uploadFeatures.benefit2: Zoom in on specific areas for detailed analysis
uploadFeatures.benefit3: Have our AI health advisors evaluate and discuss your documents
uploadFeatures.benefit4: Take photos directly from your camera for immediate consultation
uploadFeatures.registeredOnly: These special features are available to registered users.
